message:
fix: multiple bug fixes in context pack and unified messaging

- Fix context.go: stats/clear commands now use global cache (was creating
  ephemeral builders with empty caches, making commands useless)
- Fix pack.go: truncateJSON now produces valid JSON (was naively truncating
  at byte boundary, breaking JSON parsing)
- Fix pack.go: replace deprecated strings.Title with manual title casing
- Fix pack.go: renderXML now uses consistent iteration order
- Fix context.go: remove unnecessary min() function (Go 1.21+ has built-in)
- Fix context.go: getRepoRev now properly trims trailing whitespace
- Fix unified.go: Read() for Agent Mail now actually fetches message content
  instead of returning placeholder

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
